<content>1: rec {
2:   outputs =
3:     inputs: # flake-parts.lib.mkFlake
4:     let
5:       lib = import ./lib inputs;
6:     in
7:     lib.merge [
8:       rec {
9:         inherit lib nixConfig description;
10:         hosts = import ./nixos/hosts inputs; # inputs.host?
11:         configurations = lib.make-nixos-configurations hosts;
12:         vm-configurations = lib.make-vm-configurations hosts;
13:         unattended-installer-configurations = lib.make-unattended-installer-configurations configurations;
14:         nixosConfigurations = lib.merge [
15:           configurations
16:           vm-configurations
17:           unattended-installer-configurations
18:         ];
19:       }
20:       (lib.make-vim)
21:       (lib.make-clan)
22:     ];
